pages.text: A Resource Slime is a slime tied to one resource. You make the first one by priming: hold a resource item (an iron ingot, say) and use it on a Productive Frogs slime of the right species - it becomes that resource's slime.$(br2)Once a slime line is going, splits can discover new resource slimes on their own.

Catch a size-1 Resource Slime in a Slime Bucket (right-click it). The bucket remembers the variant, so you can carry it, release it elsewhere, or feed it into the Slime Milker. You can also right-click a frog with a matching variant bucket to feed it directly.
